refactoring.comment: Extract method 'private int getFrequentRenterPoints(int frequentRenterPoints, Rental each)' from 'ubu.gii.dass.refactoring.Customer.statement()' to 'ubu.gii.dass.refactoring.Customer' - Original project: 'refactoring-fowler-example2' - Method name: 'getFrequentRenterPoints' - Destination type: 'ubu.gii.dass.refactoring.Customer' - Declared visibility: 'private'
